'''Tor Skirata''' was the eldest child and son of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Kal Skirata]] and the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Ilippi Skirata]]. He was also the eldest brother of [[Ijaat Skirata|Ijaat]] and [[Ruusaan Skirata|Ruusaan "Ruu" Skirata]].

Although he bore a Mandalorian name ("Tor" meant "justice"), Tor was raised by his mother and disowned his father in the formal Mandalorian custom of declaring their father "dar'buir", along with Ijaat.<ref name="Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel" />

Years later, in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], Tor contacted, via [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], his father to let him know that he had lost contact with Ruusaan and asked Kal to look for her. During the conversation, Tor said he was sorry for what he and Ijaat did to Kal.

After Kal was able to locate his lost daughter, he sent an encrypted message to his son to let that Ruu is fine, but they won't hear from them or see them for a while.

==Behind the scenes==
Tor Skirata is said to be thirty-nine and his [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] is described as being "dark-haired, thickset, smartly dressed" in ''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]''. His birthdate can therefore be extrapolated as being circa [[58 BBY/Legends|58 BBY]].
